author: clthuang
name: sin^2 Activation + Causal Screening Pipeline
blurb: Non-record submission: sin^2 periodic activation replacing relu^2 in MLP layers (1-line change), discovered via automated causal DAG-guided screening of 24 interventions including novel adaptive multi-token prediction and Rho-1 selective loss. Local MLX screening shows sin^2 competitive with GELU/SiLU. Pending H100 validation.
note: H100 results pending compute credits. Local MLX screening at reduced scale shows competitive signal.
